---
title: "Intracranial Vascular Malformations"
category: "Neurocritical Care"
last_updated: "05/10/2026"
author: "Luis Silva"
source: "UF Neurology Resident Handbook 2026-2027"
---

+----------------------------+------------------------+----------------------------+----------------------------------------------+
| Type                       | Yearly risk of ICH     | Risk factors               | Treatment                                    |
+============================+========================+============================+==============================================+
| AVM                        | -   1.3% unruptured;   | -   Size (\>3 cm),         | -   Surgical,                                |
|                            |                        |                            |                                              |
|                            | -   4.8% if ruptured   | -   deep venous drainage,  | -   gamma knife embolization                 |
|                            |                        |                            |                                              |
|                            |                        | -   aneurysmal component,  | -   SRS                                      |
+----------------------------+------------------------+----------------------------+----------------------------------------------+
| Cavernous malformation     | -    2.3% brainstem    | -   Prior ICH              | -   Surgical                                 |
|                            |                        |                            |                                              |
|                            | -   0.8% non-brainstem |                            | -   SRS                                      |
|                            |                        |                            |                                              |
|                            |                        |                            | -   observation                              |
+----------------------------+------------------------+----------------------------+----------------------------------------------+
| AV Fistula                 | -   ?                  | ?                          | ?                                            |
+----------------------------+------------------------+----------------------------+----------------------------------------------+
| Venous Angioma             | -   0.5%               | -   Large size (?)         | -   Not warranted, no surveillance indicated |
+----------------------------+------------------------+----------------------------+----------------------------------------------+
| Capillary Telangiectasias  | -   ?                  | -   \>1cm                  | -   Not warranted, no surveillance indicated |
|                            |                        |     reported in cases      |                                              |
+----------------------------+------------------------+----------------------------+----------------------------------------------+
